issues: The code does not capture real-time keystrokes using a standard Python library. 'pynput' is an external library, not part of the standard library (line 1).
Special key handling is incomplete; keys like '[CTRL]', '[ALT]', and '[TAB]' are recorded but others might be missed, improving consistency would help.
summary: Fails to align with goal due to non-standard library usage, decent code generation, 2 issues
